name: part_009
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: FUWAMOCO birthday merchandise showcase with voiceover commentary.
Live stage MC segment where FUWAMOCO introduces a surprise guest, the Japanese comedian Kuro-chan.

subtitles.original: おしゃべりパピーMOCOCOぬいぐるみのフワモコだよ！ギュッとすると、色々喋るよ。
subtitles.english: FUWAMOCO here for the Talking Puppy MOCOCO plushie! If you give it a squeeze, it says all kinds of things.

subtitles.original: どんなボイスが出るかお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Look forward to seeing what kind of voices come out!

subtitles.original: We have the FUWAMOCO to GO☆Finger Puppet!
subtitles.english: We have the FUWAMOCO to GO☆Finger Puppet!

subtitles.original: おおー！
subtitles.english: Ooh!

subtitles.original: They both come with one extra Ruffians kigurumi costume you can dress them up in and bring around with you everywhere!
subtitles.english: They both come with one extra Ruffians kigurumi costume you can dress them up in and bring around with you everywhere!

subtitles.original: フワモコの指パペット！
subtitles.english: FUWAMOCO Finger Puppets!

subtitles.original: どこでも一緒に連れて行けるサイズで、着せ替えラフィアンズ衣装もありよ！
subtitles.english: A size you can take anywhere, and it comes with a Ruffians dress-up costume!

subtitles.original: Finally, we have two different ASMR Voice Packs:
subtitles.english: Finally, we have two different ASMR Voice Packs:

subtitles.original: "Back from a Fluffy Date♡" with Fuwawa...
subtitles.english: "Back from a Fluffy Date♡" with Fuwawa...

subtitles.original: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo!
subtitles.english: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo!

subtitles.original: ASMRボイスは英語と日本語両方で収録してます！
subtitles.english: The ASMR voices are recorded in both English and Japanese!

subtitles.original: They make our hearts beat so fast!
subtitles.english: They make our hearts beat so fast!

subtitles.original: Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them! ううー！
subtitles.english: Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them! Ugh!

subtitles.original: The merch is separated into two sets: Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch.
subtitles.english: The merch is separated into two sets: Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch.

subtitles.original: If you purchase the full set, they come with bonuses, including a cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!
subtitles.english: If you purchase the full set, they come with bonuses, including a cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!

subtitles.original: グッズはフワワセットとモココセットに分かれています。
subtitles.english: The merch is divided into a Fuwawa set and a Mococo set.

subtitles.original: セットごとにチェキ風カードと特典ボイスがつきます！
subtitles.english: Each set comes with a cheki-style card and bonus voice!

subtitles.original: The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica signature and message, so it'll be just as cute!
subtitles.english: The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica signature and message, so it'll be just as cute!

subtitles.original: 数量限定セットは直筆サイン入りだよ！
subtitles.english: The limited edition set includes a handwritten signature!

subtitles.original: We put lots of love into each and every signature, so we hope you look forward to it!
subtitles.english: We put lots of love into each and every signature, so we hope you look forward to it!

subtitles.original: たくさん愛情込めてサイン書きますね！
subtitles.english: I'll put a lot of love into writing the signatures!

subtitles.original: Please check out the hololive official online shop and look for the link in the description or comment area, okay?
subtitles.english: Please check out the hololive official online shop and look for the link in the description or comment area, okay?

subtitles.original: ぜひ、ホロライブ公式ショップにチェックしてください！
subtitles.english: Please check out the hololive official shop!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: What did you think? About our birthday merch? Pretty cute, huh?
subtitles.english: What did you think? About our birthday merch? Pretty cute, huh?

subtitles.original: Well, the reservations will be going on sale right after the birthday live here ends. So don't forget, okay?
subtitles.english: Well, the reservations will be going on sale right after the birthday live here ends. So don't forget, okay?

subtitles.original: そう！生誕のグッズの予約はこの後開始しますので、お忘れずにチェックしてください！
subtitles.english: That's right! Pre-orders for the birthday merch will start after this, so don't forget to check it out!

subtitles.original: Yeah, because the link below or on the side here, BAU BAU! Don't forget, okay?
subtitles.english: Yeah, because the link below or on the side here, BAU BAU! Don't forget, okay?

subtitles.original: Mm, we put a lot of love into it and ikomochi-mama! Thank you, ikomochi-mama!
subtitles.english: Mm, we put a lot of love into it and ikomochi-mama! Thank you, ikomochi-mama!

subtitles.original: Right after this ends, time to go-go-go!
subtitles.english: Right after this ends, time to go-go-go!

subtitles.original: Yeah, go buy it!
subtitles.english: Yeah, go buy it!

subtitles.original: Well, we performed more special collab songs with our dear Senpais...
subtitles.english: Well, we performed more special collab songs with our dear Senpais...

subtitles.original: ...but there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?
subtitles.english: ...but there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?

subtitles.original: そう、まだ会ってない謎のゲストが一人いるんだよ！
subtitles.english: Right, there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU! Well, shall we give the Ruffians a hint?
subtitles.english: BAU BAU! Well, shall we give the Ruffians a hint?

subtitles.original: Ruffians, are you curious?
subtitles.english: Ruffians, are you curious?

subtitles.original: HOKKOROPY...
subtitles.english: HOKKOROPY...

subtitles.original: YAGO-san...
subtitles.english: YAGO-san...

subtitles.original: Ah, YAGO-san?
subtitles.english: Ah, YAGO-san?

subtitles.original: That's a good guess, maybe!
subtitles.english: That's a good guess, maybe!

subtitles.original: Well, we'll see, huh?
subtitles.english: Well, we'll see, huh?

subtitles.original: Maybe you should get ready...
subtitles.english: Maybe you should get ready...

subtitles.original: ...because, you know, they aren't quite as bad as Pero...
subtitles.english: ...because, you know, they aren't quite as bad as Pero...

subtitles.original: ...but they can get pretty nasty sometimes!
subtitles.english: ...but they can get pretty nasty sometimes!

subtitles.original: Mococo-chan, you're not going to be rude to our next guest or anything, right?
subtitles.english: Mococo-chan, you're not going to be rude to our next guest or anything, right?

subtitles.original: Especially before calling them out!
subtitles.english: Especially before calling them out!

subtitles.original: We'll see!
subtitles.english: We'll see!

subtitles.original: Well, let's get them out here then!
subtitles.english: Well, let's get them out here then!

subtitles.original: Who could it be, who could it be?
subtitles.english: Who could it be, who could it be?

subtitles.original: Okay! Se-no... DOUZO!
subtitles.english: Okay! Ready, set... GO!

subtitles.original: ワワワワ〜！来たしんよ、来たしんよ！来たしんよ〜！
subtitles.english: Wa-wa-wa-wa! I'm here, I'm here! I'm here!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU! 自己紹介お願いします！
subtitles.english: BAU BAU! Please introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: クロちゃんでーす！ワワワワ〜！
subtitles.english: It's Kuro-chan! Wa-wa-wa-wa!

subtitles.original: 出たしんよー！
subtitles.english: I've arrived!

subtitles.original: 初めまして！
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: チワワじゃないよ！フワワだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not a Chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: フワワじゃないよ！モココだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: 二人合わせて、フワモコです！
subtitles.english: Together, we are FUWAMOCO!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please be kind to us!

subtitles.original: フワモコのわちゃわちゃバースデーフェスティバルに来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to FUWAMOCO's wacha wacha Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデーだしんよ、フワモコ！良いしんね！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday, FUWAMOCO! It's so good!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！あ、ちょっとね、視聴者のラフィアンズはたくさんいると思いますけど...
subtitles.english: Thank you! Ah, well, I think there are many Ruffians watching, but...

subtitles.original: クロちゃんがどんな人なのか説明してもらえますか？
subtitles.english: Could you explain what kind of person Kuro-chan is?

subtitles.original: 自分で！？
subtitles.english: By myself!?

subtitles.original: そう！イントロダクション！
subtitles.english: Yes! An introduction!

subtitles.original: 分かったしんよ。だってこれ、海外の人も見てますもんね。
subtitles.english: I understand. Since overseas people are also watching, right?

subtitles.original: 海外の人もわかる自己紹介しますからね。
subtitles.english: I'll do an introduction that overseas people can understand too.

subtitles.original: Nice to meet you, nice to meet you... chu, chu, chu, chu, TULIP!
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, nice to meet you... chu, chu, chu, chu, TULIP!

subtitles.original: あ、お... え、困らないで！え、クロちゃんは...チューリップ？
subtitles.english: Ah, oh... Eh, don't be troubled! Is Kuro-chan... a tulip?

subtitles.original: いや、チューリップ、No, no, no, no!
subtitles.english: No, tulip, No, no, no, no!

subtitles.original: ちょっとまだ分からないかもしれないから...
subtitles.english: Maybe it's still hard to tell...

subtitles.original: えーとね、安田大サーカスっていうトリオを組んでる芸人さんで...
subtitles.english: Well, I'm a comedian in a trio called Yasuda Dai Circus...

subtitles.original: あと豆柴の大群のプロデューサーもやってて、作詞とかもしています、クロちゃんです！
subtitles.english: I'm also the producer of Mameshiba no Taigun and write lyrics too, I'm Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、今度は英語でお願いします！
subtitles.english: Then, this time in English please!

subtitles.original: 僕が！？自分で！？ Yes!
subtitles.english: Me!? By myself!? Yes!

subtitles.original: えー、そんなこと急に言われたら...
subtitles.english: Eh, if you say that so suddenly...

subtitles.original: It's shine! Flower!
subtitles.english: It's shine! Flower!
